author: Brandjuh
name: EventManager
description: Schedules and starts MissionChief alliance large missions and alliance events through CookieManager.
install_msg:
EventManager installed.

Use `[p]eventmanager inspect large` and `[p]eventmanager inspect event` first to inspect the live MissionChief forms. Then configure presets with `[p]eventmanager profile set` before starting or scheduling events.
short: MissionChief alliance mission and event scheduler
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores configured event presets, schedule settings, and run timestamps. It does not store member data.
